entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop species under study for restorer breeding programs.

entities.name: A1 CMS SYSTEM
entities.description: A specific cytoplasmic male sterility system in pearl millet.

entities.name: A4 CMS SYSTEM
entities.description: A specific cytoplasmic male sterility system in pearl millet.

entities.name: RESTORER GENES
entities.description: Genes that restore male fertility in CMS systems.

entities.name: MALE FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of a plant to produce functional pollen.

entities.name: TESTCROSSES
entities.description: A breeding method used to determine the genetic relationship between restorer lines.

entities.name: ALLELIC COMPLEMENTATION
entities.description: The process of determining if different restorer lines carry the same allele of a restoration gene.

entities.name: MALE STERILITY
entities.description: The condition where a plant cannot produce functional pollen, characteristic of CMS systems.
